name: lukeslp-team
description: Council-style codebase-assessment plugin: a 10-seat team takes your code and tells you what it is, what breaks it, what kills it, and any legal red flags

plugins.name: team
plugins.description: Council-style technical assessment of a codebase. Three subcommittees (research, technical, skeptics) plus a standalone legal red-flag check feed an executive chair. Optional consultant fan-out to external models.
